style_guidelines.lighting: Lumière naturelle, douce, évitant les ombres dures. Ambiance matinale ou fin d'après-midi.
style_guidelines.composition: Minimaliste, beaucoup d'espace négatif, focus sur les textures (cuir, mesh, gel).

product_assets.name: Solenia Aura
product_assets.prompt: Studio photography of a sleek minimalist sneaker, bamboo fly-knit texture, soft grey color, floating in mid-air, clean off-white background, soft studio lighting, high resolution, 8k.

product_assets.name: Solenia Terra
product_assets.prompt: Side profile of a rugged but elegant hiking shoe, forest green and earth tones, vibram sole detail, placed on a smooth river stone, natural outdoor lighting, blurred nature background, cinematic.

product_assets.name: Solenia Lumina
product_assets.prompt: Close-up of a high-end leather dress shoe, cognac brown full-grain leather, impeccable stitching, set on a dark wooden surface, warm soft light, luxury aesthetic.

product_assets.name: Solenia Zenith
product_assets.prompt: Minimalist slip-on shoe, pure white color, plush memory foam appearance, resting on a soft linen fabric, bright and airy atmosphere, zen vibe.

product_assets.name: Ergo-Active Pro
product_assets.prompt: Technical insole with visible gel heel insert and nylon arch support, blue and grey accents, top view and side view, scientific diagram style, clean white background.

lifestyle_assets.description: A person walking mindfully on a clean urban sidewalk, focus on the feet and lower legs, wearing Solenia Aura, morning sunlight casting long soft shadows, serene atmosphere.
lifestyle_assets.prompt: Lifestyle photography, close-up on feet walking on a modern city street, minimalist sneakers, soft morning sun, serene and healthy vibe, high-end fashion photography style.

lifestyle_assets.description: Abstract image representing balance and movement. A stack of smooth stones near a clear water stream.
lifestyle_assets.prompt: Zen stones balanced on top of each other, near a calm river, soft focus, sage green and sand colors, peaceful, well-being concept.
